arts.ttl: Middlesbrough closing in on loan deals for Kelechi Iheanacho and Samuel Iling-Junior
arts.sum: Boro are working to conclude loan deals for both attacking players ahead of Monday evening's transfer deadline as they expect to lose Emmanuel Latte Lath to Atlanta United after agreeing a club-record fee for the striker. Iling-Junior is currently on loan in Serie A with Bologna, having joined Aston Villa in the summer from Juventus.

arts.ttl: League One promotion contenders to name key Sunderland figure as new boss

arts.ttl: Middlesbrough in talks to sign Iheanacho and Iling-Junior
arts.sum: Middlesbrough have entered talks to sign striker Kelechi Iheanacho and winger Samuel Iling-Junior on loan until the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa winger set for Middlesbrough move amid game time concerns
arts.sum: Middlesbrough are set to sign Aston Villa’s Samuel Iling-Junior on loan for the rest of the season, according… The post Aston Villa winger set for Middlesbrough move amid game time concerns appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Sunderland willing to accept £10m Premier League bid for winger
arts.sum: Sunderland will sanction a £10m sale of Tommy Watson if Brighton can guarantee the money up-front and not… The post Sunderland willing to accept £10m Premier League bid for winger appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Middlesbrough-Sunderland prediction made as Michael Carrick is told how to exploit Le Bris' side
arts.sum: It's an impressive achievement thus far, in only head coach Regis Le Bris’ first campaign in the Sunderland hotseat after his summer arrival on Wearside in the wake of their disastrous 16th-placed finish last term. Imperative points dropped - thanks to soft goals - in the dying embers of the fixture which could cost the Black Cats dearly towards the business end of the campaign.

arts.ttl: Michael Carrick's verdict on Middlesbrough selling key players and the 'extreme' football cycle
arts.sum: Michael Carrick says selling players is part of the natural cycle in football and has no problem with star men leaving Middlesbrough - amid Emmanuel Latte Lath's impending departure. In that sense, when selling a key player like Latte Lath, the vital next step becomes trusting the recrtuitment team and process to adequately replace him.

arts.ttl: Middlesbrough in talks to sign Aston Villa winger as Michael Carrick's side also look to beat Celtic to former Manchester City star
arts.sum: SIMON JONES: Middlesbrough are in talks to sign a winger from Aston Villa. Michael Carrick's side are also looking to beat Celtic to a former Manchester City star.
